name: Ubiquiti airMAX Bullet AC IP67
title: Ubiquiti airMAX Bullet AC IP67
short_description: Dual-Band airMAX® ac Radio, AirOS, 1x GLAN, throughput 300+ Mbps, 22 dBm, POE-RJ-45, IP67, PoE injector sold separately
description: Dual-Band airMAX® ac Radio, AirOS, 1x GLAN, throughput 300+ Mbps, 22 dBm, POE-RJ-45, IP67, PoE injector sold separately

detailed_description.heading: Dual-Band Wireless Radio / Access Point
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti airMAX Bullet AC IP67, with its model manufacture part number BulletAC-IP67, represents a significant evolution in the field of high-performance network broadcasting equipment. Designed and built by Ubiquiti Networks, a brand renowned for its innovative approach to networking technology, this device stands out for its robustness, efficiency, and adaptability, catering to a wide range of networking and communication needs.

detailed_description.heading: Performance and Hardware
detailed_description.text: At the heart of the airMAX Bullet AC IP67 is its advanced airMAX AC technology, which enhances performance and scalability. This technology employs a proprietary protocol that significantly reduces interference while simultaneously increasing throughput, making it ideal for high-demand network environments. The device operates in the 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz frequency bands, offering flexibility in network configuration and deployment. This dual-band capability ensures that it can accommodate a wide array of applications, from point-to-point (PtP) to point-to-multipoint (PtMP) setups, providing solutions for both short and long-distance communications.

detailed_description.heading: Connectivity and Features
detailed_description.text: It is designed to deliver a formidable performance with a throughput rate of over 300 Mbps on the 5 GHz band, effectively covering both the 2.4 and 5 GHz frequency bands. This device is notable for its robust build, featuring IP67 weatherproofing that ensures durability and reliability in various environmental conditions. This certification indicates that the device is fully protected against dust ingress and water. The robustness afforded by this rating makes the Bullet AC an ideal choice for outdoor deployments, where exposure to harsh environmental conditions is a significant concern. Its durable casing not only ensures protection from water and dust but also from UV radiation and wind, underscoring its capability to perform in diverse climatic conditions without compromise.

detailed_description.heading: Design and Installation
detailed_description.text: The device's physical design is both compact and efficient, making it easy to install in a variety of settings without requiring complex mounting hardware or significant space. The BulletAC-IP67's design is streamlined for ease of use, featuring a single Ethernet port for connectivity. This simplicity extends to its power requirements, as it supports 24V passive Power over Ethernet (PoE) with a maximum power consumption of 7W, enabling it to receive both power and data over a single cable, thus minimizing cable clutter and reducing the complexity of deployment. It boasts a maximum transmission (TX) power of 21 dBm, facilitating strong and reliable wireless connections. Connectivity is managed via a Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 port, underscoring its compatibility with high-speed network infrastructures.
